misc.title: ／ プレゼント企画✨ ＼ 『#魔男のイチ』 少年ジャンプ32号表紙イラストポスター(B2サイズ)を 抽選で3名様に🎁 1⃣@jump_henshubuをフォロー 2⃣この投稿をリポストで応募完了 ※7/19(日)まで マジキーパーと共にフヂミネに挑め❗️ JC最新9巻発売御礼‼️ 表紙＆巻頭カラーの本誌もぜひご一読を📖

misc.title: This isn’t accurate.💔 As a native Japanese speaker, I can say that the Japanese word *douryou* can be used not only for Sanji, but also for Robin or Chopper if Zoro were referring to them. That said,
misc.text: This isn’t accurate.💔 As a native Japanese speaker, I can say that the Japanese word *douryou* can be used not only for Sanji, but also for Robin or Chopper if Zoro were referring to them. That said, Zoro and Sanji may both eventually surpass Kaido or Shanks.🥰 Funoyaki (@_Funoyaki_) Zoro refers to Sanji as "douryou" 同僚 and not the usual "nakama". He's just repeating what Sommers said (Sommers called Killingham 同僚 too), but it's interesting since the term doesn't just mean "colleague", it also carries a sense of "equal role or status". #ONEPIECE1187 — https://nitter.net/_Funoyaki_/status/2074020584749695217#m

misc.title: THE TRUMP EFFECT: The USA just lost to Belgium in the World Cup Round of 16 by a score of 4-1, right after Trump personally called FIFA to clear star striker Balogun to play. Sports fans are calling i
misc.text: THE TRUMP EFFECT: The USA just lost to Belgium in the World Cup Round of 16 by a score of 4-1, right after Trump personally called FIFA to clear star striker Balogun to play. Sports fans are calling it the Trump curse. He attended the Super Bowl and predicted a Chiefs win, but the Eagles blew them out. He was there when the Commanders hosted the Lions and lost at home. He watched from a suite as Miami fell in the College Football National Championship. He sat in the owner’s suite when the Knicks snapped their huge playoff streak in NBA Finals Game 3. And he attended the Ryder Cup where Europe topped the US team.

misc.title: Belgium's ticket to the Quarter-finals has been punched 🎟️ #FIFAWorldCup Link 📺 fifa.com
misc.text: Belgium's ticket to the Quarter-finals has been punched 🎟️ #FIFAWorldCup Link 📺 fifa.com

misc.title: El mundial es una payasada: 1: Nos metieron 4 tiempos de 25 minutos, directamente se llevaron puesto el deporte. 2: Una selección no pudo alojarse en el país anfitrión. 3: No dejaron entrar al mejor á
misc.text: El mundial es una payasada: 1: Nos metieron 4 tiempos de 25 minutos, directamente se llevaron puesto el deporte. 2: Una selección no pudo alojarse en el país anfitrión. 3: No dejaron entrar al mejor árbitro de Africa designado por FIFA 4: Le perdonaron una tarjeta roja a un futbolista por un llamado del emperador 5: Se juega en 3 países a la vez 6: No dejaron participar a Rusia por la guerra mientras el país anfitrión invadió 3 países el último año. 7: Todo es timba, están apostando hasta en los conventos. 8: Tocó Maná

misc.title: Después de esto espero que nadie se atreva a decir que la libertad de expresión no existe, tenéis literalmente un partido político neonazi, racista y machista. 𝐄𝐥 𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 (@ElImperialEsp) �
misc.text: Después de esto espero que nadie se atreva a decir que la libertad de expresión no existe, tenéis literalmente un partido político neonazi, racista y machista. 𝐄𝐥 𝐈𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐚𝐥 (@ElImperialEsp) 🇪🇸 | 🔴 Iván, portavoz de Núcleo Nacional, descubre su rostro en un vídeo en el que además anuncia la presentación del partido político Noviembre Nacional. Video — https://nitter.net/ElImperialEsp/status/2073811935389184487#m

misc.title: Aight! Lets talk about it The premiere genuinely felt like watching an episode that came out just a week after #170. Recaps were tastefully placed in the middle of dialogues and not used for padding.
misc.text: Aight! Lets talk about it The premiere genuinely felt like watching an episode that came out just a week after #170. Recaps were tastefully placed in the middle of dialogues and not used for padding. Isaac Kis 🍀 (@kis_isaac) As soon as I get home I promise I'll write about my thoughts regarding the episode — https://nitter.net/kis_isaac/status/2073562044826288430#m
